problem id: 0bc6e675
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10010111 -> 00110011
  01010001 -> 00111010
  01011101 -> 00001011
  11011000 -> 10011111
  10101010 -> 01010101
  11000100 -> 11111100
  01001100 -> 11001111
  01110001 -> 10111110

query: 11100110
predicted answer: 01111100
